scripts.build:wasm: cd backend && GOWORK=off GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -o ../public/pasta-demo.wasm .
scripts.copy:wasm-exec: mkdir -p public && install -m 0644 "$(go env GOROOT)/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js" public/wasm_exec.js
scripts.prepare:demo: npm run copy:wasm-exec && npm run build:wasm && npm run build
